# Job Application Tracker - Frontend Interface

> [← Back to Root Project](../README.md)

This directory houses the **React + Vite Frontend Client** for the Job Application Tracker workflow application. 

It acts as a highly responsive, ultra-fast UI explicitly fine-tuned with minimalist CSS variables and robust client-side validation to provide a sleek, performant application.

## Core Interface Features

- **Kanban Automation Board**: A beautifully smooth drag-and-drop workflow allowing you to naturally pull job applications through custom interview pipelines natively inside the DOM.
- **Dynamic Analytics Selectors**: Custom component layouts perfectly synced between light/dark mode CSS themes.
- **Stateless Integration**: Secures your endpoints utilizing client-side persistence of JWT Bearer configurations.

## Expanding Development

To boot the frontend natively:

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

Remember to ensure your API server is running on `:3000`. To access API schematics or boot the underlying databases, check out the [Backend Engine README](../backend/README.md).
